list.name: instrument
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT instrument_key FROM bronze.market_ticks ORDER BY instrument_key

list.name: ticker
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT ticker FROM raw.historical_prices ORDER BY ticker

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Ticks" FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instrument_key) AS "Instruments" FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Bars" FROM silver.ohlcv_1min WHERE bucket::date = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ticker) AS "Tickers" FROM raw.historical_prices

SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', timestamp) AS time, instrument_key, COUNT(*) AS ticks FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND ($__all = '$instrument' OR instrument_key IN ($instrument)) GROUP BY time, instrument_key ORDER BY time

SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', timestamp) AS time, instrument_key, last(ltp, timestamp) AS price FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND ($__all = '$instrument' OR instrument_key IN ($instrument)) GROUP BY time, instrument_key ORDER BY time

SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) AS time, instrument_key, MAX(volume) AS volume FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp >= $__timeFrom() AND timestamp <= $__timeTo() AND ($__all = '$instrument' OR instrument_key IN ($instrument)) GROUP BY time, instrument_key ORDER BY time

SELECT trade_date AS time, ticker, close_price AS close FROM raw.historical_prices WHERE trade_date >= $__timeFrom()::date AND trade_date <= $__timeTo()::date AND ($__all = '$ticker' OR ticker IN ($ticker)) ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT instrument_key, COUNT(*) AS tick_count, MIN(ltp) AS low, MAX(ltp) AS high, last(ltp, timestamp) AS last_price, MAX(volume) AS volume, MIN(timestamp) AS first_tick, MAX(timestamp) AS last_tick FROM bronze.market_ticks WHERE timestamp::date = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY instrument_key ORDER BY tick_count DESC
